text: User: use inquirer crate -- make it called `tenex-edge config` -- one of the menu options is configuring providers, another is configuring models (with model listing from the different providers (i.e. list the models from the configured ollama endpoint (somtimes localhost, could be anything, could be sometimes ollama cloud, etc) -- or the openrouter models -- with fuzzy search, etc a REAL good UX [...] - **`catalog.rs`** — live model fetch: Ollama `GET /api/tags`, OpenRouter `GET /api/v1/models` (context length + pricing) [...] - **`models_menu.rs`** — role picker → provider picker (skips the prompt if only one provider is configured) → **fuzzy-searchable live model list** → confirm → write [...] 1. **Fuzzy rows are single-line, two-zone**: primary text (matched chars accent+bold) + dimmed metadata suffix in an aligned column. OpenRouter primary is the **id** (not display name — that's what lands in llms.json), metadata `200k ctx · $3.00/$15.00 per Mtok`; Ollama is name + `4.7 GB · 2 days ago`, sorted modified-desc. Never use a background color for match highlight (unknown-theme hazard) and never wrap rows; drop price <100 cols, all metadata <70. Page size 12 with a live `3/312` counter.
